scores.correctness_notes: Mostly correct but has inaccuracies: gold standard shows ensure_contents mode default is None (not 0o644), path parameter type is ContainerPath|LocalPath (not str|PathLike|PathProtocol), and source type is ReadableBuffer (not BinaryIO|TextIO). Also omits install method (uv add charmlibs-pathops).
scores.hallucination_notes: Claims glob() does not support '**' recursive patterns — not mentioned in gold standard and may be fabricated. Mode default shown as 0o644 in parameter table but gold standard specifies None as default. Parameter types for path and source differ from gold standard specification.
